title: 「名詞 + to-infinitive」句型
titleEn: The to-infinitive as a postmodifier or complement of a noun

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 37 -「名詞 + to-infinitive（to + 原形動詞）句」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Noun + to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Noun + to + base verb + other information
Subject + be + noun phrase + to + base verb
Subject + have / need / find / provide + noun + to + base verb
There + be + noun + to + base verb

example: Sleeping is a good way to improve efficiency.
exampleZh: 睡覺是提升效率的好方法。

examples.en: Sleeping is a good way to improve efficiency.
examples.zh: 睡覺是提升效率的好方法。
examples.highlight: a good way to improve efficiency

examples.en: Wider access is one of the best ways to revive interest in the arts.
examples.zh: 更廣泛的接觸，是重振大眾對藝術興趣的最佳方法之一。
examples.highlight: ways to revive interest in the arts

meaning.zh: To-infinitive 放在名詞後，說明與該名詞有關的動作、目的、用途、責任、權利、機會或可能性。

rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after to.
rules.zh: To 後面必須使用原形動詞。

rules.en: Common nouns followed by a to-infinitive include way, responsibility, right, opportunity, chance, need, reason, decision, choice, plan, time, place, environment, home, school, book, topic, question, task and method.
rules.zh: 常與 to-infinitive 連用的名詞包括 way、responsibility、right、opportunity、chance、need、reason、decision、choice、plan、time、place、environment、home、school、book、topic、question、task 和 method。

rules.en: Some nouns receive the action of the following infinitive: a book to read, a topic to discuss or problems to solve.
rules.zh: 有些名詞代表後面動作的「承受者」，例如 a book to read、a topic to discuss 或 several problems to solve。

rules.en: Keep a necessary preposition at the end of the infinitive phrase.
rules.zh: 某些句子要保留句尾介詞，不可錯誤刪去。

rules.en: Not every noun takes to + verb. Nouns such as benefit, advantage, disadvantage and downside normally take of + noun or gerund in the meanings shown here.
rules.zh: 並非所有名詞都使用 to + 動詞。Benefit、advantage、disadvantage 和 downside 等名詞表達相關意思時，通常使用 of + 名詞／動名詞。

rules.en: Some nouns permit more than one structure, such as a way to solve/of solving, a chance to speak/of speaking, and a method to reduce/of reducing/for reducing.
rules.zh: 部分名詞可以使用多於一種結構；本練習的目標是把句子改寫成 名詞 + to-infinitive。
examples: a way to solve the problem

rules.en: Do not mistake prepositional to for an infinitive marker. To followed by a noun is a preposition; to followed by a base verb forms the target to-infinitive.
rules.zh: 不要把介詞 to 誤認為 to-infinitive。To 後面是名詞時屬於介詞；後面是原形動詞時才屬於本課目標句型。
examples: Hong Kong is home to many international companies.
The children need a home to live in.

benefits.en: It clearly explains the relationship between a noun and an action.
benefits.zh: 清楚說明物品、地方、機會、權利或責任與甚麼動作有關。
不需要每次都使用 which、that 或 where 等較長結構，也可以把資料放在名詞後面。

benefits.en: It helps you use practical fixed frames.
benefits.zh: 可直接使用 a chance to、a responsibility to、the right to 和 a way to 等實用句框。

benefits.en: It describes objects and places more precisely.
benefits.zh: 能說明物品的用途，或人們可以在某個地方進行甚麼活動。

benefits.en: It avoids excessive repetition of sentence structures.
benefits.zh: 可避免反覆使用 which、where、can、should 或 must，令寫作更有變化。

sourceOmissions: The PDF presents the Important Rules mainly in Chinese; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a noun followed by to + base verb.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用「名詞 + to + 原形動詞」改寫以下句子，並保持原意。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Sleeping is a good way of improving efficiency.
questions.promptZh: 睡覺是提升效率的好方法。
